name: excel-xlsx
tagline: ClawHub (290★): Create, inspect, and edit Microsoft Excel workbooks and XLSX files with reliable formulas, dates, types, formatting, recalc
verdict: Main risk: pandas and openpyxl are used as hard dependencies throughout, with no install step or availability check, despite the metadata declaring required binaries -- if either is missing, the skill just breaks mid-task. Its name field also isn't kebab-case. Quality is otherwise solid (B).

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in the skill; 'Related Skills' lists sibling install options but never states when this skill should be skipped in favor o
pandas and openpyxl are invoked as core dependencies throughout the skill with no requirements section, install step, or availability check; metadata even declares requires.bins as
name field is not kebab-case (contains spaces, slash, uppercase); the separate slug field (excel-xlsx) is kebab-case but H02 judges the name field itself.
